title: Deliciously Sour Portuguese Pork Skewers
description: A festive Portuguese dish featuring rum, pickle, and anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients, these sour pork skewers are perfect for any occasion. The combination of sour and sweet flavors will leave you wanting more.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together rum, pickle juice, olive oil, garlic, ginger, turmeric, salt, and black pepper.
Add the pork cubes to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated pork cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the pork is cooked through.
Garnish with bay leaves and serve immediately.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as grilled vegetables or quinoa.
Refrigerate any leftovers for up to 3 days.
